task_description: Add a confirmation popup section to the medication reminder alert that asks users if they took their medicine via Yes/No radio buttons, then saves to history on confirmation or dismisses on decline.

verification.summary: bun run build succeeds. bun run lint shows only 2 pre-existing issues (no new errors). No test framework present in the project so test_quality is skipped. No Dockerfile present.

issues_fixed: Replaced shared useTransition isPending with per-alert pendingAlerts Set<string> to prevent disabling all alerts when one is saving
Added existence guard in confirmMedicationIntake using getMedication check before writing
Added duplicate intake check (last_taken_date === today) to prevent orphan log entries on double-tap
